query: UPDATE resultadosExames SET nomeExame = 'VDRL' WHERE nomeExame COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = 'vdrl'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v7At4WPQpm4aRf.9e6a8ae0e28e --database bSA4q7aMJsJeSmafooCq7A --execute UPDATE resultadosExames SET nomeExame = 'VDRL' WHERE nomeExame COLLATE utf8mb4_bin = 'vdrl'
